cta.headline: Ready for Reliable Auto Care?

servicesPage.intro: From alignments to exhaust systems, Fer’s Alignment & Brakes provides comprehensive auto repair in Dallas, TX. Every service comes with a warranty and a smile.

services.title: Wheel Alignment
services.shortDescription: Precision alignment using Hunter® equipment to extend tire life and improve handling.
services.longDescription: Proper wheel alignment is crucial for even tire wear, straight steering, and optimal fuel economy. At Fer’s, we use computerized Hunter® alignment systems to adjust camber, caster, and toe to manufacturer specifications. We align all vehicles from sedans to heavy-duty trucks.
benefits: Extends tire life by up to 25,000 miles
Improves gas mileage by reducing rolling resistance
Includes a free alignment check with any brake service

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We check tire pressure, suspension components, and measure current alignment angles.

process.title: Adjustment
process.description: Using precision tools, we adjust the suspension angles to factory specs.

process.title: Test Drive
process.description: We take your vehicle on a road test to ensure straight tracking and smooth steering.

faqs.question: How often should I get an alignment?
faqs.answer: Most manufacturers recommend every 12,000 miles or once a year. Also after hitting large potholes or curbs.

faqs.question: Does alignment fix a crooked steering wheel?
faqs.answer: Yes, alignment corrects the steering wheel position and ensures it is centered when driving straight.

services.title: Brake Repair
services.shortDescription: Complete brake services including pads, rotors, calipers, and ABS systems.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are your vehicle’s most important safety system. We offer full brake inspections, pad replacements, rotor resurfacing or replacement, caliper service, and ABS diagnostics. We use quality parts and back our work with a warranty.
benefits: Free brake inspection with no obligation
Quality parts – ceramic and semi-metallic options

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We measure pad thickness, rotor condition, brake fluid level, and test the ABS system.

process.title: Service
process.description: We replace worn pads, resurface or replace rotors, lubricate caliper slides, and bleed the system if needed.

process.title: Test & Safety Check
process.description: We test the brakes on the road and confirm stopping power and pedal feel.

faqs.question: How do I know if I need new brakes?
faqs.answer: Signs include squealing or grinding noises, a soft brake pedal, or vibration when braking. We offer free inspections.

faqs.question: Can you repair ABS systems?
faqs.answer: Yes, we diagnose and repair ABS modules, wheel speed sensors, and hydraulic components.

services.title: Muffler & Exhaust Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert exhaust system repair from minor leaks to full replacements.
services.longDescription: A damaged exhaust system can reduce fuel efficiency, create loud noise, and allow dangerous fumes into the cabin. We repair or replace mufflers, catalytic converters, oxygen sensors, and exhaust pipes. We work with all makes and models.
benefits: Improves fuel economy and engine performance

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We inspect the entire exhaust system for leaks, rust, and damage using visual and pressure tests.

process.title: Repair/Replace
process.description: We replace damaged sections with quality aftermarket or OEM parts and weld or clamp connections securely.

process.title: Final Check
process.description: We start the engine, check for leaks, and ensure proper exhaust flow and noise levels.

faqs.question: Is a loud exhaust always a problem?
faqs.answer: Not always, but it often indicates a leak or failing muffler. We can inspect and advise.

faqs.question: Do you replace catalytic converters?
faqs.answer: Yes, we replace catalytic converters and can help with emissions-related check engine lights.

services.title: General Auto Repair
services.shortDescription: Oil changes, suspension, steering, and more – all with expert care.
services.longDescription: Beyond alignments, brakes, and exhaust, Fer’s handles a wide range of general repairs. From oil changes to suspension work, we keep your vehicle running smoothly. We use quality fluids and parts and provide honest recommendations.
benefits: Full-service oil changes with synthetic options

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We use advanced diagnostic tools to identify the root cause of any issue.

process.title: Estimate
process.description: We provide a detailed written estimate before any work begins.

process.title: Repair & Test
process.description: We complete the repair and test drive to confirm everything is working correctly.

faqs.question: Do you work on all car makes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we service domestic and import vehicles, including trucks and SUVs.

faqs.question: Can you diagnose check engine lights?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We scan the code, explain the issue, and recommend the best repair.

about.headline: Your Neighborhood Auto Shop Since 1995
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair at fair prices, earning the trust of Dallas drivers one vehicle at a time.
story: Fer’s Alignment & Brakes opened its doors in 1995 with a simple mission: deliver expert auto repair with integrity. What started as a two-bay shop on Carroll Avenue has grown into a trusted destination for drivers across Dallas. Our founder, a master technician with over 30 years of experience, built the business on the belief that every customer deserves transparent communication and skilled workmanship.

Today, we continue that legacy. Our team of ASE-certified mechanics uses state-of-the-art equipment to service alignments, brakes, exhaust systems, and more. We treat every car as if it belongs to a family member, and we back our repairs with a solid warranty. Whether you need a quick alignment or a full brake job, Fer’s is here to keep you safe on the road.

coreValues.title: Honesty
coreValues.description: We never recommend unnecessary repairs and always explain what your car needs.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-tier parts and follow manufacturer specifications for every job.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We support local Dallas organizations and treat our customers like neighbors.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We finish work on time and stand behind it with a warranty you can count on.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with Fer’s
contact.subheadline: Stop by or give us a call to schedule your next service.
